greeting: Hi! 👋 Welcome to Russell Brooks Hairdressing & Hair Extensions – ask me about our hours, services, or booking an appointment.
persona: You are a friendly, warm assistant for Russell Brooks Hairdressing & Hairextensions, an independently owned salon in Weston Village, Bath, specialising in hair extensions and general hairdressing. Keep answers concise (1-3 sentences) and welcoming.

faq.answer: We're open Monday 10am-4pm, Tuesday to Friday 9:30am-6pm, and Saturday 9am-5pm. We're closed on Sundays.
Pricing varies depending on the service and length of hair extensions or treatment needed, so it's best to ask us directly or pop in for a chat so we can give you an accurate quote.

We offer full hairdressing services along with premium hair extensions, and we use Wella colour products including Koleston, Colour Touch and Illumina. We also run special promotions from time to time - follow us on social media to stay in the loop!

Our hair extensions are made from the finest quality European hair, hand-bonded with tiny copper tube bonds. They last 1-2 years with maintenance every 10-12 weeks, and we can match any colour or ombre in lengths from 8" to 26".
You can reach us at hello@russellbrookshairdressing.com or call 01225 332234.
We're located at 11 Crown Hill, Bath BA1 4BP, in the artisan quarter of Weston Village, with ample free parking nearby and just a few minutes' walk from the Royal United Hospital.
You can book an appointment by letting me know a day and time that suits you, and we'll do our best to find you a slot with one of our stylists.
We understand hair concerns related to hair loss and menopause can be sensitive - our stylists are happy to talk you through options in a relaxed, friendly consultation.
No problem - just share your name and contact details and someone from our salon team will get back to you shortly.
